about.heading: How <gradient>CLIMATRIX</gradient> works
about.p1: The hard part of carbon accounting isn't the math — it's gathering messy data from finance, fleet, facilities and suppliers, and making it defensible. CLIMATRIX is built around a Data Hub that does exactly that.
about.p2: Three steps: declare your reality, drop your files, review and report — with every number carrying its factor, formula and quality grade.

0.title: 1 · Declare your reality
0.description: Country, sites, currency, and which GHG categories apply to you — a two-minute setup that becomes your reporting boundary.

1.title: 2 · Drop your files, any format
1.description: Utility bills, fuel cards, travel exports, ERP dumps. The AI reads them through your profile and maps every line — in seconds, not weeks.

2.title: 3 · Review, close gaps, report
2.description: The Data Hub shows what arrived, its quality, and what is missing. Answer the few real questions, commit, and export a defensible inventory.

3.title: Built on the standards
3.description: GHG Protocol, ISO 14064, CSRD — audit-ready methodology built in.

screens.heading: See <gradient>CLIMATRIX</gradient> In Action
screens.subheading: Powerful features that make carbon management effortless.

featuresSection.heading: What's inside <gradient>the platform</gradient>
featuresSection.subheading: From emissions tracking to compliance reporting, all tools in one platform.

0.name: The Data Hub
0.description: One living map of your inventory: declare which GHG categories are relevant, see what data arrived, what quality it has, and exactly what is still missing — with a chase list of who to ask.

1.name: AI Smart Import
1.description: Drop any spreadsheet — fuel cards, utility bills, ERP spend dumps. The parser knows your organization before it reads a row and maps every line to the right scope and category.

2.name: Honest data quality
2.description: Every line lands on a ladder: measured / calculated / estimated / gap. Estimates never masquerade as measured data — so a verifier can trust the number.

3.name: Reports & audit trail
3.description: Full Scope 1, 2 and 3 reporting with the factor, source and formula behind every figure — plus an audit package and verification workflow.

4.name: Decarbonization planning
4.description: Model reduction scenarios and plan your path to net-zero on top of real data.

5.name: CBAM Compliance
5.description: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism support: quarterly reports and certificate costs — plus a free exemption checker anyone can run, no signup.

6.name: Product Carbon Footprint
6.description: Model any product’s BOM and get a cradle-to-gate PCF per ISO 14067 — exported as PACT v3 JSON your customers can ingest.

7.name: LCA-lite
7.description: Screening-grade life-cycle assessment on your PCF models: 16 EF 3.1 impact categories across the EN 15804 modules (A1–D), with honest per-indicator data-coverage disclosure.

8.name: EPD Preparation
8.description: ISO 14025 / EN 15804+A2 declaration preparation on a verified footprint — EN 15804 PDF plus ILCD+EPD digital dataset. Your program operator publishes it; we prepare it.

9.name: Verifier Portal
9.description: Your external auditor gets a read-only portal with full provenance and audit log — verification without email ping-pong.

security.heading: <gradient>Enterprise-Grade</gradient> Security
security.subheading: Your data security is our top priority. Built with the highest security standards and compliance frameworks.
security.cardBody: Your data is encrypted and protected 24/7

features.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to track, report, and reduce your environmental footprint in one comprehensive platform.

chain.heading2: from company footprint to published product declaration
chain.subheading: Each tool builds on the one before it — the corporate inventory feeds product footprints, product footprints feed screening LCA, and a verified footprint becomes an EPD your program operator publishes. No data re-entry between steps.

ghg.name: Corporate Carbon Footprint
ghg.blurb: Your full organizational GHG inventory — Scopes 1, 2 & 3.

pcf.name: Product Carbon Footprint
pcf.blurb: Cradle-to-gate footprint per product, exchanged in PACT v3.

lca.name: LCA-lite
lca.blurb: Screening-grade impacts beyond carbon — 16 EF 3.1 categories.

ghg.name: Corporate Carbon Footprint (CCF)
ghg.tagline: Your full GHG inventory — GHG Protocol & ISO 14064-1
ghg.description: Your complete organizational inventory across Scopes 1, 2 and 3 — calculated, screened, and ready for the reports your stakeholders actually ask for.
items: Scopes 1, 2 & 3 — all 15 Scope 3 categories with a screening matrix for completeness
Consolidation approach and reporting boundary declared up front
ISO 14064-1 report plus VSME, ESRS E1 and CDP exports
Base-year & recalculation policy disclosure
Hands off to the read-only Verifier Portal for external verification
Per-row provenance and data-quality tiers behind every figure
AI-powered data extraction from invoices
Real-time dashboard and analytics

pcf.name: Product Carbon Footprint (PCF)
pcf.tagline: Cradle-to-gate footprints per product, exchanged in PACT v3
pcf.description: Model your products’ bills of materials and calculate cradle-to-gate footprints your customers’ systems can actually consume.
items: ISO 14067 cradle-to-gate footprint per declared unit
BOM modeling grounded in the same audited factor library
PACT v3 Data Exchange JSON your customers’ systems ingest
Supplier PCF ingestion with primary-data-share tracking
Per-line derivation stories — how each number was calculated
CBAM synergy — shared CN product codes

lca.name: LCA-lite
lca.description: A screening-grade life-cycle assessment computed straight on your PCF models — the EF 3.1 impact method across the EN 15804 lifecycle, with honest disclosure of what the data actually covers.
items: EF 3.1 impact method — 16 impact categories beyond climate
Results matrix: every indicator × EN 15804 lifecycle modules (A1–D)
Built on your PCF models — no data re-entry
Curated free dataset library to fill impact data
Honest per-indicator data-coverage disclosure — you see exactly what each result rests on
Screening-grade by design — a fast, transparent first pass, not a critical-review LCA
lca.placeholder: Screenshot coming — LCA-lite is live in the app today, on the PCF module.

epd.name: EPD Generator
epd.tagline: Verification-ready EPDs — published by your program operator
epd.description: Turn a verified footprint into an ISO 14025 / EN 15804+A2 declaration package. We prepare the EPD end-to-end; your program operator reviews and publishes it — we do not issue EPDs ourselves.
items: Pins a verified footprint snapshot — the declaration never drifts from its data
EN 15804 core + additional indicator results tables
EN 15804-structured PDF plus ILCD+EPD digital dataset (machine-readable EPD)
Third-party verification workflow through the token-gated verifier portal
5-year validity tracking
Program-operator registration tracking — publication stays with your operator
epd.placeholder: Being built right now — declaration preparation on top of your verified PCF + LCA results.

verifier.name: Verifier Portal
verifier.tagline: Give your auditor a window, not a spreadsheet
verifier.description: External verifiers get read-only access to the inventory they’re verifying — with the provenance behind every number, and none of the email ping-pong.
items: Read-only, token-gated access for external verifiers
Full inventory with per-row provenance
Audit log of every change and every visit
Revocable, period-scoped — no verifier account needed
Built for ISO 14064-3 verification (remote allowed per ISO 14064-5)
verifier.placeholder: Screenshot coming — the portal is live in the app today.

cbam.name: CBAM Compliance
cbam.tagline: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Made Easy
cbam.description: Stay compliant with EU CBAM regulations with automated reporting and certificate management.
items: 20+ CBAM product categories supported
Quarterly reporting automation
Certificate cost calculation
XML report generation for EU submission
Installation and import tracking
Country-specific emission factors

items: What-if scenario modeling
Initiative impact projection
Cost-benefit analysis
Timeline-based planning
Progress tracking and reporting
Science-based target alignment

compare.heading: Compare Plans
compare.subheading: Detailed feature comparison across all plans

items.question: How does the 14-day free trial work?
items.answer: For 14 days you run the full parser and calculation engine on your own data — no credit card required. Report exports and some advanced views unlock when you subscribe. At the end of the trial your account is paused, but your data is preserved.

items.question: Which modules are included?
items.answer: Every plan includes the full corporate carbon footprint (CCF). CBAM ships in Beta on Professional, and the verifier portal is included wherever report exports are. The product-level tools — PCF, LCA-lite and EPD preparation — are add-on modules on top of Professional.

items.question: How do the add-on modules (PCF, LCA-lite, EPD) work?
items.answer: They sit on top of a Professional subscription and are priced by what you actually declare: PCF and LCA-lite per product, EPD preparation per declaration. All three are in Beta today. LCA-lite is screening-grade — a fast, transparent first pass, not a critical-review LCA — and for EPDs we prepare a verification-ready declaration package that your program operator reviews and publishes; we don't issue EPDs ourselves. Email avi@climatrix.co for a quote.

items.question: Can I switch plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, changes take effect at the next billing cycle.

items.question: We only report once a year — do we need a subscription?
items.answer: No. The Report Pass is built for exactly that: a one-time $1,790 purchase that opens everything in Professional for 90 days, licensed to the reporting year you're working on. Your data and audit trail stay afterwards, and auditors can be given access again with a new pass or a subscription.

items.question: What if we outgrow the included sites or seats?
items.answer: Professional includes 5 sites and 2 users. Add capacity anytime without changing plans: site packs add 5 sites for $490/year, and extra seats are $190/year each.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express) and bank transfers for annual enterprise contracts.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit, every organization's data is strictly isolated, and the platform keeps a comprehensive audit trail of who changed what.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for non-profits?
items.answer: Yes, we offer special pricing for non-profit organizations, educational institutions, and startups. Contact us to learn more.

items.question: What support do you provide?
items.answer: All plans include email support. Professional plans include priority support with faster response times. Enterprise plans include dedicated account management and phone support.
